summary: Iteration 37: Hard Quota Enforcement Testing. Backend unit tests (3/3 passed) confirm: reservation creation blocked at quota, CSV export blocked at quota, PDF report blocked at quota. All tests return correct quota_exceeded envelope with code, metric, limit, used, cta_href=/pricing, cta_label='Planları Görüntüle'. HTTP preview tests were rate-limited (300s cooldown) so live validation deferred. Code review confirms correct implementation in quota_enforcement_service.py, reservations.py, tours_browse.py, reports.py, exports.py, enterprise_export.py, enterprise_audit.py.
passed_tests: Code review: quota_enforcement_service.py - enforce_quota_or_raise correctly raises AppError with code=quota_exceeded
Code review: quota_enforcement_service.py - details include metric, limit, used, cta_href=/pricing, cta_label='Planları Görüntüle'
Code review: reservations.py - create_reservation calls enforce_quota_or_raise before DB insert
Code review: tours_browse.py - POST /api/tours/{tour_id}/reserve calls enforce_quota_or_raise
Code review: reports.py - GET /api/reports/sales-summary.csv calls enforce_quota_or_raise for export.generated
Code review: exports.py - POST /api/admin/exports/run calls enforce_quota_or_raise when dry_run=false
Code review: enterprise_export.py - POST /api/admin/tenant/export calls enforce_quota_or_raise
Code review: enterprise_audit.py - GET /api/admin/audit/export calls enforce_quota_or_raise
Code review: report_output_service.py - generate_match_risk_executive_pdf calls enforce_quota_or_raise for report.generated
Code review: frontend api.js apiErrorMessage correctly extracts error.message from response envelope
Code review: frontend api.js parseErrorDetails correctly extracts error.code from response envelope
Login page loads correctly (verified via Playwright)
Rate limit error message displayed correctly in Turkish: 'Çok fazla istek. Lütfen daha sonra tekrar deneyin.'
critical_code_review_comments: SUCCESS: enforce_quota_or_raise in quota_enforcement_service.py (lines 114-181) correctly blocks and raises AppError(403, quota_exceeded) with full details

SUCCESS: AppError envelope includes: metric, metric_label, tenant_id, organization_id, plan, plan_label, limit, used, remaining, requested_increment, period, warning_level, action_label, cta_href='/pricing', cta_label='Planları Görüntüle'
SUCCESS: Hard quota checks are placed BEFORE database writes in create_reservation (line 41-46) and tour reserve (lines 195-200)
SUCCESS: Export endpoints (reports.py:60-65, exports.py:352-358, enterprise_export.py:57-63, enterprise_audit.py:72-78) all enforce quota before generating output
SUCCESS: Report generation (report_output_service.py:171-176) enforces quota before PDF generation
SUCCESS: Frontend api.js correctly parses the error envelope - apiErrorMessage extracts error.message, parseErrorDetails extracts error.code

success_rate.frontend: N/A - rate limited on login, code review confirms correct implementation

seed_data_creation: Unit tests create isolated test data in temp MongoDB databases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hard quota enforcement is fully implemented and unit-tested. The 3 pytest cases in test_hard_quota_enforcement.py validate reservation.created, export.generated, and report.generated quota blocking. HTTP preview tests were blocked by rate limiting (300s cooldown per email). Frontend error parsing in api.js is confirmed correct via code review. To test live, wait for rate limit cooldown or use a different test email.

feature_validation_summary.export.generated_quota_enforcement: PASS - Unit test confirms 403 with quota_exceeded when limit=10 reached
feature_validation_summary.report.generated_quota_enforcement: PASS - Unit test confirms 403 with quota_exceeded when limit=20 reached
feature_validation_summary.quota_exceeded_error_envelope: PASS - Contains code, metric, limit, used, cta_href, cta_label as required
feature_validation_summary.frontend_error_parsing: PASS - apiErrorMessage and parseErrorDetails handle envelope correctly
feature_validation_summary.usage_page_regression: DEFERRED - Rate limited, but /api/tenant/usage-summary endpoint code review confirms correct implementation
feature_validation_summary.billing_subscription_regression: DEFERRED - Rate limited, code unchanged from iteration_36
